chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD R.A No. 218 of 2000 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For regular heairng. 16.11.2016. Mr. Abdul Hameed Bajwa, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Sunder Das, Advocate for respondent. = Today, Mr. Abdul Hameed Bajwa, Advocate is present and on last date of hearing he made a statement that parties have settled their dispute amicably. He has also pointed out that a statement has been filed by respondent Shamshad Ali, who is also present in person today, wherein he stated that he has no objection if this revision application is allowed and in this regard he has also undertaken not to implement the judgment & decree dated 20.01.2000 & 22.01.2000, which were passed by the learned IVth Additional District Judge, Hyderabad in his favour. The respondent Shamshad Ali is present in Court and he has been explained the contents of his above statement by his newly appointed Counsel Mr.Aoon Muhammad Jamali, who is Associate of Mr. Abdul Latif Bhatti. Mr. Sunder Das, Advocate is also present and submits that though he is no more representing the above named respondent Shamshad Ali but in order to assist the Court, he has also explained to said respondent the contents of his statement dated 05.11.2016, which has been signed by respondent Shamshad Ali, so also his present Counsel Mr. Abdul Latif Bhatti, who is reported to be on general adjournment. In view the above facts and circumstances, the present revision application is allowed. The parties should bear their own costs. JUDGE Shahid
